steps_completed.task: Add get_market_analytics() handler in backend/server.py with volume, trade_count, price_history, and top_traders aggregation. Support ?interval= query param with validation.
Register route in route_request() for /v1/markets/{id}/analytics (GET only, 405 for non-GET). Update service_index_payload() to list the new endpoint.
Add MarketAnalyticsResponse, PriceHistoryEntry, and TopTrader types in frontend/src/lib/api/types.ts.
Add getMarketAnalytics() client function and useMarketAnalytics() hook with query key in frontend.
Add 7 integration tests: volume/trade_count, price_history bucketing, top_traders ranking, 404 unknown market, 405 POST, 400 invalid interval, empty market zeros.
